# @llmnative/react — Riferimento completo

Framework React AI-first per generazione deterministica di UI. Data-driven di default, schema-driven opzionale.
Versione 1.0.0 — Apache-2.0

```bash
npm install @llmnative/react
import '@llmnative/react/dist/index.css'
```

---

## Regole fondamentali

- Tutti gli import da `'@llmnative/react'` — mai da sottodirectory
- I provider sono iniettati via `<App providers={...}>` — mai importati direttamente nei componenti
- Usare `useDataProvider()`, `useAuthProvider()`, ecc. nei componenti, non istanze dirette
- TypeScript strict: no `any` — usare `unknown`, `Record<string, unknown>`, tipi specifici
- Naming props: `view` (presentazione contenuto), `appearance` (guscio visuale), `layout` (disposizione spaziale), `mode` (comportamento operativo), `variant` (tono semantico), `position` (ancoraggio), `size` (scala)

---

## App — Entry point

```tsx
<App
  providers={{
    firebase: {                        // FirebaseConfig — tutte le chiavi flat
      apiKey, authDomain, databaseURL, projectId,
      storageBucket, messagingSenderId, appId,
    },
    supabase: { url, anonKey },
    google: { clientId, scope },       // flat — NON { oAuth2: { clientId } }
    dropbox: { clientId },             // DropboxConfig
    mock: { data: mockData },
    ai: {                              // AIConfig — NON una prop separata di <App>
      openaiApiKey, geminiApiKey, anthropicApiKey,
      deepSeekApiKey, mistralApiKey, openRouterApiKey,
    },
    proxy: { enable: true, route: '/api/proxy' },
    custom: { data: { myAdapter: new MyDataProvider() } },
    services: {
      data:        'dbRealtime',      // DataDriverName
      storage:     'firestorage',     // StorageDriverName | null
      auth:        'googleAuth',      // AuthDriverName | null
      email:       'gmail',           // EmailDriverName | null
      ai:          'openai',          // AIDriverName | null
      credentials: 'googleServiceAccount',
    },
  }}
  iconProvider="lucide"              // 'lucide' | 'phosphor' | AppIconProviderConfig
  themeProvider="default"            // 'default' | 'flat' | 'cyber' | AppThemeProviderConfig
  menuConfig={menuConfig}
  importPage={(path) => import(path)}
  LayoutDefault={MyLayout}           // layout wrapper custom (opzionale)
  appName="MyApp"                    // nome app (opzionale)
  i18n={{ locale: 'it', translations: { ... } }}
  contextProviders={MyContextProvider}
  errorReportUrl="/api/errors"
  debug={import.meta.env.DEV}
/>
```

### AppThemeProviderConfig
```ts
{
  mode?: 'light' | 'dark' | 'system';
  theme: string;
  themes?: Record<string, {
    preset?: { colors?: ColorScale; radius?: number; font?: string };
    motion?: MotionRegistry;
    components?: Record<string, Partial<ThemeComponent>>;
  }>;
  themeOverride?: Record<string, Partial<ThemeComponent>>;
}
```

Built-in themes: `default`, `flat`, `cyber`.

---

## Provider System

### Matrix completa

| Servizio | Interfaccia | Driver | Config key | Obbligatorio |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| data | `DataProviderAdapter` | `mock`, `dbRealtime`, `firestoreDb`, `supabaseDb` | `providers.mock/firebase/supabase` | sì (fallback: mock) |
| storage | `StorageProviderAdapter` | `firestorage`, `supabaseStorage` | `providers.firebase/supabase` | no |
| auth | `AuthProviderAdapter` | `googleAuth`, `firebaseAuth`, `supabaseAuth`, `dropboxAuth` | `providers.google/firebase/supabase/dropbox` | sì (fallback: googleAuth) |
| email | `EmailProviderAdapter` | `gmail` | `providers.google` | no |
| ai | `AIProviderAdapter` | `openai`, `gemini`, `anthropic`, `deepseek`, `mistral`, `openrouter`, `opencode` | `Config.tsx AIConfig` | no |
| credentials | `CredentialsAdapter` | `googleServiceAccount` | `providers.google.serviceAccount` | no |

### Hooks

```ts
const data    = useDataProvider()           // DataProviderAdapter | null
const storage = useStorageProvider()        // StorageProviderAdapter | null
const auth    = useAuthProvider()           // AuthProviderAdapter | null
const email   = useEmailProvider()          // EmailProviderAdapter | null
const ai      = useAIProvider()             // AIProviderAdapter | null
const creds   = useCredentialsProvider()    // CredentialsAdapter | null

// Named provider (multi-provider setup)
const supabase = useDataProvider('supabase')
```

### Interfacce principali

```ts
// DataProviderAdapter
read(path, options?) / set(path, data) / update(path, data) / remove(path)
subscribe(path, callback: (records: RecordArray) => void): () => void
count?(path, where?): Promise<number>

// StorageProviderAdapter
upload(file, path): Promise<string|undefined>
getURL(path) / download(path): Promise<Blob|undefined> / delete(path): Promise<boolean>

// AuthProviderAdapter
signIn(intent?, options?) / signOut() / getUser(): UserProfile|null
onAuthChange(callback) / getAccessToken(): Promise<string|null>
```

### Auth sign-in methods

| method | Firebase | Supabase | Google |
|---|---|---|---|
| `password` | ✅ | ✅ | — |
| `anonymous` | ✅ | ✅ | — |
| `magic_link` | — | ✅ | — |
| `oauth` (github, apple…) | ✅ | ✅ | — |
| GIS + scoped token | — | — | ✅ |

```ts
await auth.signIn({ method: 'password', email: '...', password: '...' })
await auth.signIn({ method: 'oauth', provider: 'github' })
// Google: token per API scope
const token = await auth.getAccessToken('https://www.googleapis.com/auth/gmail.send')
```

### CredentialsAdapter (Google Service Account)
```tsx
// Chiama Google APIs lato browser senza Node.js
<App providers={{ google: { serviceAccount: { clientEmail, privateKey } }, services: { credentials: 'googleServiceAccount' } }} />

const creds = useCredentialsProvider()
const token = await creds.getToken('https://www.googleapis.com/auth/solar')
```

### Provider custom
```ts
import { DataProviderAdapter, RecordArray } from '@llmnative/react'

export class RestDataProvider implements DataProviderAdapter {
  async read(path: string): Promise<unknown> { ... }
  async set(path: string, data: object): Promise<void> { ... }
  async update(path: string, data: object): Promise<void> { ... }
  async remove(path: string): Promise<void> { ... }
  subscribe(path: string | undefined, callback: (records: RecordArray) => void): () => void {
    return () => undefined
  }
}
```

---

## Grid — CRUD table/gallery

```tsx
<Grid
  path="/users"               // DataProvider-backed — oppure records={array} per in-memory
  columns={[
    { key: 'name',  label: 'Nome',   sortable: true },
    { key: 'email', label: 'Email' },
    { key: 'role',  label: 'Ruolo',  render: ({ value }) => <Badge>{value}</Badge> },
    { key: 'date',  label: 'Data',   render: 'date' },
  ]}
  actions={['add', 'edit', 'delete']}   // oppure Record<string, GridAction>
  view="table"                          // 'table' | 'gallery'
  pagination={{ limit: 20 }}
  groupBy="status"
  sortable={{ field: 'name', dir: 'asc' }}
  form={<FormFields />}
  onSave={async ({ record, action }) => record._key}
  onComplete={async ({ record, action }) => true}
  selection={{ mode: 'multiple', onChange: (sel) => {} }}
  reorderable
  onReorder={(records, meta) => {}}
  header={(ctx) => <div>{ctx.title}</div>}
  footer={(ctx) => <div>{ctx.records.length} records</div>}
/>
```

| Prop | Tipo | Note |
|---|---|---|---|
| `path` | `string \| "fromUrl"` | Path provider-backed |
| `records` | `RecordArray` | Dati in memoria (alternativa a path) |
| `columns` | `GridColumn[]` | `{ key, label, sortable?, render?, className? }` |
| `actions` | `Array<'add'\|'edit'\|'delete'> \| Record<string, GridAction>` | |
| `view` | `'table' \| 'gallery'` | |
| `groupBy` | `string \| string[]` | |
| `pagination` | `PaginationParams` | `{ limit, page?, maxPageButtons?, align?, sticky? }` |
| `sortable` | `boolean \| OrderConfig` | |
| `selection` | `false \| 'single' \| 'multiple' \| GridSelectionConfig` | |
| `form` | `ReactElement \| ((ctx) => ReactNode)` | Form condiviso per CRUD |
| `onSave` | `GridMutationSaveHandler` | `async ({ record, action }) => string` |
| `onDelete` | `GridMutationDeleteHandler` | `async ({ record }) => string` |
| `onComplete` | `GridAfterActionHandler` | `async ({ record, action }) => boolean` |
| `onRowClick` | `(record) => void` | |
| `reorderable` | `boolean` | Abilita drag & drop righe |
| `onReorder` | `GridReorderHandler` | `(records, meta) => void` |
| `onLoad` | `(records) => TRecord[]` | Trasforma records dopo il fetch |
| `editDeepLink` | `boolean` | Sincronizza modal edit con URL |
| `audit` | `boolean` | Logga mutazioni |
| `sticky` | `'top' \| 'bottom'` | Header/footer sticky |
| `wrapperClassName` | `string` | CSS wrapper esterno |
| `loading` | `boolean` | Stato loading override |
| `title` | `ReactNode` | Titolo header grid |
| `before` / `after` | `ReactNode` | Slot prima/dopo il contenuto |
| `header` / `footer` | `ReactNode \| ((ctx) => ReactNode)` | Header/footer custom |

**GridAction kind:** `'modal'` (default), `'route'`, `'external'`, `'inline'`, `'delete'`

---

## Form — form CRUD con lifecycle

```tsx
<Form
  path="/products"
  appearance="card"           // 'card' | 'empty'
  showBack
  defaultValues={{ status: 'draft' }}
  keyGenerator={() => `prod_${Date.now()}`}
  onLoad={(data) => { /* side-effect hook, non trasforma */ }}
  onSave={async ({ record, action }) => { /* return storagePath or undefined */ }}
  onDelete={async ({ record }) => { /* confirm */ }}
  onComplete={async ({ action }) => { if (action === 'save') navigate('/products') }}
>
  <Input name="title" label="Titolo" required />
  <Input name="price" label="Prezzo" inputType="number" />
  <Input name="address.city" label="Città" />      {/* oggetto annidato */}
  <Repeat name="tags" defaultLength={1}>
    {(i) => <Input name={`tags.${i}`} label={`Tag ${i+1}`} />}
  </Repeat>
</Form>
```

| Prop | Tipo | Note |
|---|---|---|---|
| `path` | `string` | Path provider-backed |
| `appearance` | `'card' \| 'empty'` | Guscio visuale |
| `controller` | `FormController` | Controller condiviso per bottoni custom esterni |
| `showBack` | `boolean` | Pulsante Back nel footer |
| `defaultValues` | `RecordProps` | Valori iniziali per nuovo record |
| `keyGenerator` | `(record) => string` | Generatore chiave primaria custom |
| `persistDraft` | `boolean` | Salva bozza locale su modifiche non salvate |
| `noticeAnchorRef` | `React.RefObject<HTMLElement>` | Ancoraggio sticky per notifiche |
| `showNotice` | `boolean` | Mostra notifiche save/delete (default `true`) |
| `children` | `ReactNode \| ((fields) => ReactNode) \| (({ record }) => ReactNode)` | Contenuto form |
| `header` | `ReactNode` | Contenuto header custom |
| `footer` | `ReactNode` | Contenuto footer custom |
| `wrapperClassName` | `string` | CSS wrapper esterno |
| `headerClassName` | `string` | CSS header |
| `className` | `string` | CSS body form |
| `footerClassName` | `string` | CSS footer |
| `log` | `boolean` | Logga ogni modifica su console |
| `onLoad` | `(record) => void` | Side-effect dopo il caricamento (non trasforma) |
| `onRecordChange` | `(record) => void` | Cambio campo in tempo reale |
| `onSave` | `FormSaveHandler` | `async ({ record, prevRecord?, storagePath?, action }) => string \| undefined` |
| `onDelete` | `FormDeleteHandler` | `async ({ record }) => string \| undefined` |
| `onComplete` | `FormFinallyHandler` | `async ({ record, action }) => boolean` |

**Form controller** — stato e azioni native del form accessibili da qualsiasi punto della pagina.

Due hook:

| Hook | Dove usarlo | Cosa restituisce |
|---|---|---|
| `useFormController(controller?)` | Ovunque (anche fuori dal form) | Crea o si aggancia a un `FormController`. Senza argomenti ne crea uno locale stabile. Con un `controller` esistente ci si aggancia. |
| `useFormActions()` | Solo dentro `<Form>` (legge dal context) | Restituisce lo stesso `FormController` del form genitore. Lancia errore se usato fuori. |

Esempio — bottone custom fuori dal form:
```tsx
const form = useFormController();

<ActionButton disabled={form.saveDisabled} onClick={() => { void form.save(); }} />
<Form controller={form} persistDraft onSave={...} />
```

Esempio — uso dentro il form (senza passare controller):
```tsx
function MySaveButton() {
  const form = useFormActions();
  return <LoadingButton disabled={form.saveDisabled} loading={form.isSaving} onClick={form.save} />;
}
```

Stato esposto dal controller: `record`, `isNewRecord`, `isDirty`, `canSave`, `canDelete`, `isSaving`, `isDeleting`, `saveDisabled`, `deleteDisabled`, `hasDraft`, `draftStatus`, `errors`, `hasErrors`.

Azioni: `save()`, `delete()`, `reset()`, `restoreDraft()`, `discardDraft()`.

---

## Campi form

### Input
```tsx
<Input name="x" label="..." required />               // text (default)
<Input.Number  name="price" min={0} max={100} step={0.01} />
<Input.Email   name="email" />
<Input.Password name="pwd" />
<Input.Date    name="date" />
<Input.TextArea name="bio" rows={4} />
<Input.Checkbox name="active" valueChecked="yes" />
<Input.Color   name="color" />
```
`InputProps`: `name`(req) `label` `required` `disabled` `placeholder` `min` `max` `step` `validator:(v)=>string|undefined`

**NOTA**: `inputType` NON è una prop pubblica — usa i sub-componenti `Input.Number`, `Input.Email` ecc.

### Select / Autocomplete / Checklist
```tsx
<Select name="role" options={[{ label: 'Admin', value: 'admin' }]} />
<Select name="categoryId" optionsSource={{ path: '/categories', labelField: 'name', valueField: '_key' }} />
<Select.Autocomplete name="userId" optionsSource={{ path: '/users', labelField: 'email' }} />
<Select.Checklist name="tags" options={['a', 'b', 'c']} />
```

| Prop | Tipo | Note |
|---|---|---|
| `options` | `Option[] \| string[] \| number[]` | |
| `optionsSource` | `{ path, labelField, valueField?, where?, order?, fieldMap?, onLoad? }` | Carica da provider |
| `order` | `{ field: 'label' \| 'value', dir: 'asc' \| 'desc' }` | |
| `placeholderOption` | `Option` | Solo Select |
| `placeholder` | `string` | Solo Autocomplete |
| `creatable` | `boolean` | Solo Autocomplete — crea nuovi valori |
| `onCreate` | `(value) => Promise<void>` | Solo Autocomplete |
| `minItems` / `maxItems` | `number` | Solo Autocomplete |
| `itemClassName` | `string` | Solo Checklist |
| `validator` | `(value) => string \| undefined` | Tutte le varianti |
| `readOnlyAfterSet` | `boolean` | readonly dopo primo valore |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | |
| `title` | `string` | |
| `feedback` | `string` | Messaggio di errore/suggerimento |

### UploadImage / UploadDocument / UploadCSV
```tsx
<UploadImage name="cover" label="Copertina" />    {/* con crop editor */}
<UploadDocument name="pdf" label="PDF" />
<UploadCSV name="data" label="Importa CSV" />      {/* con preview tabellare */}
```

**UploadImageProps** (eredita FormFieldProps):
| Prop | Tipo | Note |
|---|---|---|
| `name` | `string` (required) | |
| `uploadPath` | `string` | Path storage per upload automatico |
| `accept` | `string` | MIME types accettati |
| `editable` | `boolean` | Abilita crop editor |
| `multiple` | `boolean` | Multipla selezione |
| `max` | `number` | Numero massimo file |
| `feedback` | `string` | Testo placeholder drop zone |
| `srcsetWidths` | `number[]` | Larghezze varianti responsive |
| `previewHeight` / `previewWidth` | `number` | Dimensioni preview |

**UploadDocumentProps** (eredita FormFieldProps): `name`, `uploadPath`, `accept`, `editable`, `multiple`, `max`

### UploadCSV
```tsx
<UploadCSV name="data" label="Importa CSV" />
```
| Prop | Tipo |
|---|---|
| `name` | `string` (required) |
| `onDataLoaded` | `(data: UploadCSVData) => void` |
| `onParseField` | `([key, value]) => [key, value] \| undefined` |
| `normalizeKeys` | `boolean` |
| `removeEmptyFields` | `boolean` |
| `delimiter` | `string` |
| `label` / `icon` | Opzionali |

### ImageField
```tsx
<ImageField
  name="hero"
  label="Hero image"
  defaultValue={{ src: 'https://example.com/hero.jpg', alt: 'Hero shot' }}
  srcsetWidths={[400, 800]}
  uploadPath="/content/images"
/>
```

Gestisce un oggetto `{ src, alt, srcset?, sizes? }`, preview inline, crop editor e generazione opzionale di varianti responsive.

### CropImage
```tsx
<CropImage img={imageObj} title="Ritaglia" scales={{ '1:1': 1, '4:3': 1.33 }} />
```
Componente di ritaglio indipendente. `img` ha tipo `{ fileName, variants }` dove ogni variante è `{ fileName, type, scale, top, left, width, height, base64? }`. Usato internamente da `UploadImage` e `ImageField`, ma esportato pubblicamente per uso standalone.

### CodeEditor
```tsx
<CodeEditor
  name="code"
  label="Template"
  language="html"
  placeholder="Scrivi HTML..."
  minHeight={200}
  maxHeight={600}
  disabled={false}
  required
  validateSyntax
  commands={[{ name: 'wrap-section', handler: ({ value }) => `<section>\n${value}\n</section>` }]}
  commandsTrigger="/"
/>
```
Editor basato su CodeMirror con syntax highlighting e validazione. Linguaggi: `liquid`, `html`, `json`, `js`, `ts`, `css`.
Quando `commands` e presente, `CodeEditor` apre internamente `ContextMenu` sul trigger configurato.

| Prop extra | Tipo |
|---|---|
| `language` | `CodeEditorLanguage` |
| `placeholder` | `string` |
| `minHeight` / `maxHeight` | `number` |
| `validateSyntax` | `boolean` |
| `validator` | `(value) => string \| undefined \| Promise<string \| undefined>` |
| `extensions` | `unknown[]` |

### RichText
```tsx
<RichText
  name="body"
  label="Article body"
  placeholder="Scrivi..."
  toolbar="fixed"                    // 'fixed' | 'floating' | false
  toolbarCommands={['bold', 'italic', 'heading1', '|', 'bulletList', 'link']}
  outputFormat="html"                // 'html' | 'json' | 'text'
  statusBar={{ tagBreadcrumb: true, wordCount: true }}
  minHeight={200}
  maxHeight={800}
  imageUpload={{ path: '/content/images', srcsetWidths: [400, 800] }}
  commands={[{ name: 'summary', icon: 'sparkles' }]}
  commandsTrigger="/"
/>
```

| Prop extra | Tipo |
|---|---|
| `placeholder` | `string` |
| `disabled` | `boolean` |
| `feedback` | `string` |
| `toolbar` | `'fixed' \| 'floating' \| false` |
| `toolbarCommands` | `ToolbarCommand[]` |
| `outputFormat` | `'html' \| 'json' \| 'text'` |
| `statusBar` | `boolean \| StatusBarConfig` |
| `minHeight` / `maxHeight` | `number` |
| `imageUpload` | `RichTextImageUploadConfig` |
| `documentUpload` | `RichTextDocumentUploadConfig` |
| `validator` | `(value) => string \| undefined` |

### Repeat — array dinamici
```tsx
<Repeat name="items" defaultLength={3} minItems={1} maxItems={10} label="Elementi" layout="vertical" readOnly>
  {({ index, record, records, remove }) => (
    <>
      <Input name={`items.${index}.name`} label="Nome" />
      <UploadImage name={`items.${index}.photo`} label="Foto" />
    </>
  )}
</Repeat>
```

| Prop | Tipo | Note |
|---|---|---|
| `name` | `string` (required) | |
| `children` | `ReactNode \| ((args) => ReactNode)` | Render prop con `{ index, record, records, remove }` |
| `defaultLength` | `number` | Righe iniziali |
| `minItems` / `maxItems` | `number` | Min/max righe |
| `layout` | `'vertical' \| 'horizontal' \| 'inline'` | |
| `label` | `string` | Etichetta gruppo |
| `labelPosition` | `'top' \| 'bottom'` | |
| `hideRemoveButton` | `boolean` | Nascondi rimozione |
| `readOnly` | `boolean` | Sola lettura |
| `onChange` | `FieldOnChange` | |
| `onAdd` / `onRemove` | `(records) => void` | Callback aggiunta/rimozione |

### Prompt — campo AI-potenziato
```tsx
<Prompt
  name="summary"
  mode="run"                  // 'edit' | 'run'
  onRunPrompt={async (prompt, options) => AI.fetch(prompt)}
  commands={[{ name: 'translate', icon: 'languages', handler: (v) => `Translate:\n${v}` }]}
  commandsTrigger="/"         // default automatico quando commands e presente
  attachments
  statusItems={['tokensIn', 'tokensOut', 'contextPercent', 'duration']}
/>
```

Quando `commands` e presente in `mode="run"`, `Prompt` monta internamente `ContextMenu` sulla textarea del risultato. Il trigger di default e `"/"`; `commandsTrigger` permette di cambiarlo. Il menu diventa searchable automaticamente sopra una soglia interna di comandi.

`renderFallback`: quando l'AI non e configurata, `Prompt` monta un fallback testuale; passa `renderFallback` per personalizzarlo (riceve `{ name, label, required, onChange }`).

---

## UI Primitives

### Alert
```tsx
<Alert variant="success">Salvato!</Alert>
<Alert variant="warning" icon placement="fixed" timeout={3000}>Attenzione</Alert>
```
`variant`: `'info' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'light' | 'dark'`
`appearance`: `'default' | 'text'`
`placement`: `'inline' | 'fixed'`

### Badge
```tsx
<Badge variant="success">Attivo</Badge>
```
`variant`: stessi valori di Alert

### Button variants
```tsx
<ActionButton variant="primary" label="Salva" icon="save" onClick={handleSave} />
<LoadingButton variant="primary" label="Invia" onClick={async (e, setMsg) => { await save(); setMsg('Salvato!') }} />
<BackLink label="Indietro" />
<GoSite href="https://..." label="Visita" />
```

**IButton props:** `variant`, `label`, `icon`, `badge`, `disabled`, `ariaLabel`, `title`, `iconClassName`, `onClick`
**LoadingButton aggiunge:** `loading`, `loadingLabel` — `onClick` riceve `(e, setMessage?) => Promise<unknown>`

### Card
```tsx
<Card title="Titolo" header={<Actions />} footer={<Pagination />} loading={isLoading}>
  {children}
</Card>
```

### Modal
```tsx
<Modal title="Conferma" size="md" position="center" onClose={() => {}} onSave={handleSave} onDelete={handleDelete} motion="fade" allowFullscreen stackedBehind>
  {content}
</Modal>
<Modal.YesNo title="Sicuro?" onClose={() => {}} onYes={async () => true} />
<Modal.Ok title="Completato!" onClose={() => {}} />
```
`size`: `'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl' | '2xl' | 'fullscreen'`
`position`: `'center' | 'top' | 'left' | 'right' | 'bottom'`

| Prop | Tipo | Note |
|---|---|---|
| `children` | `ReactNode` (required) | |
| `title` | `ReactNode` | |
| `header` / `footer` | `ReactNode \| false` | Custom header/footer |
| `size` / `position` | Come sopra | |
| `onClose` | `() => void` | |
| `onSave` / `onDelete` | `(e) => Promise<boolean>` | |
| `allowFullscreen` | `boolean` | Toggle fullscreen |
| `showCancel` | `boolean` | Default `true` |
| `stackedBehind` | `boolean` | Modal seconda in pila |
| `closeOnBackdrop` | `boolean` | Default `true` |
| `zIndex` | `number` | |
| `motion` | `MotionReference` | Preset animazione |
| Classi CSS header/title/subtitle/body/footer | `string` | |

### Table
```tsx
<Table
  columns={[{ key: 'name', label: 'Nome', sort: true }]}
  records={records}
  onRowClick={(record) => {}}
  selection="multiple"
  sortable={{ field: 'name', dir: 'asc' }}
  pagination={{ limit: 20 }}
  onReorder={(records, meta) => {}}
  onSelectionChange={(sel) => {}}
  groupBy="status"
  renderCell={(record, key, index) => <CustomCell />}
/>
```

| Prop | Tipo |
|---|---|
| `columns` | `TableHeaderProp[]` |
| `records` | `RecordArray` |
| `sortable` | `boolean \| OrderConfig` |
| `pagination` | `PaginationParams` |
| `selection` | `'single' \| 'multiple'` |
| `onRowClick` | `(record) => void` |
| `onReorder` | `(records, meta) => void` |
| `onSelectionChange` | `(selection) => void` |
| `renderCell` | `(record, key, index) => ReactNode` |
| `groupBy` | `string \| string[]` |
| `activeKey` | `string \| null` |
| `selectedKeys` | `string[]` |
| `header` / `footer` | `ReactNode` |
| `headerClassName` / `bodyClassName` / `footerClassName` / `scrollClassName` / `selectedClassName` / `heightClassName` | `string` |

### Gallery
```tsx
<Gallery
  records={records}
  overlays={[{ position: 'topRight', badge: { variant: 'success', children: 'New' } }]}
  columns={3}
  gap={2}
  sortable={{ field: 'name', dir: 'asc' }}
  pagination={{ limit: 20 }}
  onRowClick={(record) => {}}
  onSelectionChange={(sel) => {}}
  header="Titolo"
  groupBy="status"
/>
```

`position`: `'topLeft' | 'topRight' | 'bottomLeft' | 'bottomRight' | 'middleLeft' | 'middleRight'`

| Prop | Tipo |
|---|---|
| `records` | `GalleryRecord[]` (`{ img?, thumbnail?, name?, width?, height? }`) |
| `columns` | `1 \| 2 \| 3 \| 4 \| 6` |
| `gap` | `0 \| 1 \| 2 \| 3 \| 4 \| 5` |
| `overlays` | `GalleryOverlay[]` |
| `sortable` | `boolean \| OrderConfig` |
| `pagination` | `PaginationParams` |
| `onRowClick` | `(record) => void` |
| `onSelectionChange` | `(selection) => void` |
| `groupBy` | `string \| string[]` |
| `selectedKeys` | `string[]` |
| `header` / `footer` | `ReactNode` |
| Classi CSS: `headerClassName`, `bodyClassName`, `footerClassName`, `scrollClassName`, `selectedClassName` | `string` |

### Tab
```tsx
<Tab defaultIndex={0} layout="top">
  <Tab.Item label="Generale">{content1}</Tab.Item>
  <Tab.Item label="SEO">{content2}</Tab.Item>
</Tab>
```
`layout`: `'default' | 'top' | 'left' | 'right' | 'bottom'`

### Image
```tsx
<Image src="..." fit="cover" position="center" width={400} height={300} />
```
`fit`: `'cover' | 'contain' | 'fill' | 'scale-down' | 'none'`

### Pagination (standalone)
```tsx
<Pagination records={items} limit={20}>
  {(pageRecords, offset) => pageRecords.map(r => <Row key={r._key} record={r} />)}
</Pagination>
```

### Percentage
```tsx
<Percentage value={75} appearance="bar" variant="success" showText />
<Percentage value={0.75} appearance="circle" size={60} />
```

| Prop | Tipo | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `value` | `number` | — |
| `max` | `number` | `100` |
| `min` | `number` | — |
| `appearance` | `'bar' \| 'circle'` | `'bar'` |
| `variant` | `ColorType` | — |
| `trackVariant` | `ColorType` | — |
| `thickness` | `number` | — (px) |
| `showText` | `boolean` | — |
| `size` | `number` | Diametro in modalità `'circle'` (px) |
| `fontSize` | `number` | — |
| `label` | `string` | — |

### Dropdown
```tsx
<Dropdown trigger={<Icon name="menu" />} position="end">
  <DropdownItem label="Modifica" icon="edit" onClick={() => {}} />
  <DropdownItem label="Elimina" icon="trash" variant="danger" />
  <DropdownDivider />
  <DropdownHeader label="Azioni rapide" />
</Dropdown>
```

### ContextMenu
```tsx
<ContextMenu trigger="/" searchable>
  <ContextMenu.Heading>Comandi</ContextMenu.Heading>
  <ContextMenu.Item label="Titolo" value="# " icon="heading" />
  <ContextMenu.Separator />
  <ContextMenu.Item label="Bold" value="**bold**" icon="bold" />
</ContextMenu>
```
Funziona su qualsiasi `<textarea>` / `<input>` figlio. Trigger custom (`/`, `@`, `{`), filtro searchable, navigazione tastiera, floating positioning.

| Prop | Tipo | Note |
|---|---|---|
| `trigger` | `string` (required) | Es. `"/"`, `"@"`, `"{"` |
| `searchable` | `boolean` | Filtro testuale |
| `controlled` | `ContextMenuControlledState` | Stato controllato esterno |
| `onSelect` | `(item, context) => void` | |

**EditorCommand** (usato da `commands` prop su `RichText`, `CodeEditor`, `Prompt`):
```ts
{ name: string; description?: string; icon?: string; handler?: (context: TextCommandContext) => string | Promise<string> }
```

### Altre primitive
```tsx
<Icon name="user" size={20} />           // usa provider icone configurato
<ImageAvatar src="..." label="Mario" size={40} />
<Loader />                               // spinner
<Code language="tsx">{snippet}</Code>   // syntax highlight
<GridSystem.Row><GridSystem.Col xs={12} md={6}>...</GridSystem.Col></GridSystem.Row>
<LocaleSwitcher locales={[{ code: 'it', label: 'Italiano' }]} />
<ThemeSwitcher />
<ProviderSwitcher />
<LayoutBuilder components={...} />
```

---

## Blocks

```tsx
<Breadcrumbs trail={[{ label: 'Home', href: '/' }, { label: 'Utenti' }]} separator="/" jsonLd />
<Brand url="/" label="MyApp" logo="/logo.svg" width={120} />
<Search onQueryChange={(e) => setQ(e.target.value)} />
<Notifications items={[...]} seeAllUrl="/notifications" onMarkAllRead={() => {}} />
<Carousel images={[...]} />
<Toolbar items={[...]}>
  {children}
</Toolbar>
<SideNav />
<ListCard records={records} onRowClick={(r) => {}} />
```

**Brand:**
| Prop | Tipo |
|---|---|
| `url` | `string` |
| `label` | `string` |
| `logo` | `string` |
| `width` / `height` | `number` |
| `wrapperClassName` / `className` / `logoClassName` / `labelClassName` | `string` |

**Search:**
| Prop | Tipo |
|---|---|
| `onQueryChange` | `(e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => void` |

**Notifications:**
| Prop | Tipo |
|---|---|
| `items` | `NotificationItem[]` |
| `badge` | `BadgeProps` |
| `seeAllUrl` | `string` |
| `onMarkAllRead` | `() => void` |
| `motion` | `MotionReference` |

**ListCard:**
| Prop | Tipo |
|---|---|
| `title` / `description` / `meta` | `ReactNode` |
| `badge` | `ReactNode` |
| `icon` | `string \| ReactNode` |
| `trailing` / `footer` / `children` | `ReactNode` |
| `href` | `string` |
| `external` / `active` / `disabled` / `dashed` / `compact` | `boolean` |
| `align` | `'start' \| 'center'` |
| `onClick` | `(e) => void` |
| Classi CSS: `titleClassName`, `descriptionClassName`, `metaClassName`, `badgeClassName`, `leadingClassName`, `bodyClassName`, `headerClassName`, `trailingClassName`, `footerClassName` | `string` |

**Dropdown:**
| Prop | Tipo |
|---|---|
| `trigger` | `string \| ReactNode \| DropdownTogglerProps` |
| `badge` | `BadgeProps` |
| `header` / `footer` | `ReactNode` |
| `defaultOpen` / `open` | `boolean` |
| `onOpenChange` | `(open) => void` |
| `position` | `'start' \| 'end'` |
| `placement` | `'auto' \| 'top' \| 'bottom'` |
| `strategy` | `'fixed' \| 'absolute'` |

// Menu — renderizza una sezione del menuConfig passato ad <App>
<Menu menuKey="main" />            // 'main' o qualsiasi chiave definita in MenuConfig
<Menu menuKey="topbar" className="nav flex-row gap-2" />
// NON usare context= — la prop si chiama menuKey

// AuthButton — login/logout con il provider auth configurato
<AuthButton />
```

---

## Widgets

### MarkdownReader
```tsx
<MarkdownReader
  content={markdownString}
  onInternalLinkClick={(href, e) => { e.preventDefault(); navigate(href) }}
  wrapperClassName="prose"
/>
```

### ImageEditor
```tsx
<ImageEditor src="..." onSave={(dataUrl) => save(dataUrl)} />
```

`ImageEditor` e un singolo componente pubblico. La libreria pesante `tui-image-editor` viene importata lazy a runtime dentro il componente, quindi non viene scaricata finche l'editor non viene effettivamente montato.

### TabDynamic
Tab con lazy loading dei contenuti — gestione dinamica aggiunta/rimozione tab.

---

## AI Integration

```ts
import { useAIProvider, getAIModelCatalog, createAIProviderRegistry } from '@llmnative/react'

// Hooks
const provider  = useAIProvider()           // provider di default
const registry  = useAIProviderRegistry()   // tutti i provider AI registrati
const catalog   = getAIModelCatalog()       // modelli disponibili

// Provider adapter restituito da useAIProvider()
const text  = await provider.fetch("Scrivi un titolo per: {keyword}", { keyword: "React" })
const json  = await provider.json("Lista di 5 categorie per blog tech")
const arr   = await provider.array("5 tag per: machine learning")

// Provider custom
class MyAIProvider implements AIProviderAdapter {
  async fetch(prompt: string, options?: AIRequestOptions): Promise<string> { ... }
  async json<T>(prompt: string, options?: AIRequestOptions): Promise<T> { ... }
  async array(prompt: string, options?: AIRequestOptions): Promise<string[]> { ... }
}

// Factory per registri esterni
const registry = createAIProviderRegistry(definitions)
```

Configurazione API key in `Config.tsx`: `geminiApiKey`, `openaiApiKey`, `anthropicApiKey`, `deepSeekApiKey`, `mistralApiKey`, `openRouterApiKey`.

---

## Theme e icone

```tsx
const theme = useThemeController()
theme.applyTheme('flat')     // 'default' | 'flat' | 'cyber' | custom
theme.setMode('dark')        // 'light' | 'dark' | 'system'

const icons = useIconController()
icons.setProvider('phosphor')   // 'lucide' | 'phosphor' | custom
```

---

## Head (SEO)

```ts
useHead({
  title: 'Pagina',
  description: '...',
  robots: 'noindex',
  canonical: 'https://...',
  og: { title: '...', image: '...' }
})
```

---

## Global state (localStorage)

```ts
const vars = useGlobalVars()
getGlobalVars('key')
setGlobalVars({ key: 'value' })
removeGlobalVars('key')
```

---

## Hooks completi

| Hook | Ritorna |
|---|---|
| `useDataProvider(name?)` | `DataProviderAdapter \| null` |
| `useStorageProvider(name?)` | `StorageProviderAdapter \| null` |
| `useAuthProvider(name?)` | `AuthProviderAdapter \| null` |
| `useEmailProvider(name?)` | `EmailProviderAdapter \| null` |
| `useAIProvider(name?)` | `AIProviderAdapter \| null` |
| `useAIProviderRegistry()` | `Record<string, AIProviderAdapter>` |
| `useCredentialsProvider()` | `CredentialsAdapter \| null` |
| `useTheme()` | `Theme \| undefined` |
| `useThemeController()` | `ThemeController` |
| `useIconController()` | `IconController` |
| `useAccessToken(clientID, renew?)` | `boolean` | Ottiene token per servizio esterno (true = ok) |
| `useGlobalVars()` | `Record<string, unknown>` |
| `useHead()` | `HeadController` |
| `useDocumentHead()` | `HeadController` |
| `useAssetsHead(title?)` | `void` |
| `useLanguageHead(lang?)` | `void` |
| `useSocialHead(config)` | `void` |
| `usePaginationHead(config)` | `void` |
| `usePwaHead(config)` | `void` |
| `useSchemaOrgHead(config)` | `void` |
| `useHeadLinks(links)` | `void` |
| `useProxy()` | `(url, init?) => Promise<Response>` |
| `useImage()` | `UseImageResult` |
| `useI18n()` | `I18nController` |
| `useMenu()` | Menu hook |
| `useFormController(controller?)` | `FormController` |
| `useFormActions()` | `FormController` |
| `useApiProvider(pathname?)` | `ApiProviderAdapter \| null` |
| `useSetProvider(service, driver?)` | `void` |
| `useProvider(name)` | `ProviderConfigurationState` |
| `useProviderSession()` | `ProviderSession` |
| `useDropBoxConnect(config?)` | `DropBoxConnectResult` |
| `useEnterMotion(baseStyle?, ref?, fallback?)` | `CSSProperties` |
| `useMotionState(active, ref?, fallback?, baseStyle?)` | `CSSProperties` |
| `useMotionEffect(ref?, fallback?)` | `ResolvedMotionEffect` |
| `usePressMotion(hovered, baseStyle?, ref?, fallback?)` | `{ style, pressHandlers }` |
| `useIconProvider()` | `IconProvider` |

---

## Tipi chiave

```ts
type RecordProps  = Record<string, FieldValue>
type FieldValue   = string | number | boolean | null | undefined | Record<string, unknown> | unknown[]
type RecordArray  = RecordProps[]

type OrderConfig  = { field: string; dir: 'asc' | 'desc' }
type WhereClause  = { field: string; op: '==' | '!=' | '<' | '<=' | '>' | '>=' | 'in' | 'not-in' | 'array-contains' | 'array-contains-any'; value: unknown }

interface UIProps {
  before?: React.ReactNode
  after?: React.ReactNode
  wrapperClassName?: string
  className?: string
}

type UserProfile = { uid?: string; email?: string; displayName?: string; photoURL?: string; [key: string]: unknown }
```

---

## Utilities

```ts
import { cn, converter, Sanitizer, Order, path, fetchJson, fetchRest, fetchWithRetry } from '@llmnative/react'
import { getKeywordIdeas, getGoogleTrendsData, getGoogleTrendsRelated } from '@llmnative/react'

cn('base', condition && 'extra', className)     // tailwind-merge classname
new Sanitizer().sanitize(html)                  // XSS sanitizer (non usare dangerouslySetInnerHTML)
new Order().order(records, { field: 'name', dir: 'asc' })  // ordina record array
fetchJson(url, init?)                           // fetch + JSON parse + error handling
fetchRest(path, init?)                          // fetch REST con auth
getKeywordIdeas(keyword)                        // Google Ads Keyword Ideas
getGoogleTrendsData(keyword)                    // Google Trends interest over time
getGoogleTrendsRelated(keyword)                 // Google Trends related queries
```

---

## Scaffold (npx create)

```bash
npx @llmnative/react create
npx @llmnative/react create --yes --provider=mock --template=admin
```

Flag disponibili: `--name` `--provider=firebase|supabase|mock|custom` `--ai-provider` `--icon-provider` `--theme` `--template=blank|admin|crm|inventory|project`

**5 template disponibili:**
| Template | Pagine incluse | Uso tipico |
|---|---|---|
| `blank` | home | App vuota — massima libertà |
| `admin` | home, users, roles, settings | Dashboard admin/backoffice |
| `crm` | home, companies, contacts, deals | CRM |
| `inventory` | home + gestione inventario | Magazzino |
| `project` | home + gestione progetti | PM tool |

**Struttura generata in-place nella current directory:**
```
src/
  index.tsx          ← App entry
  vite-env.d.ts
  conf/
    app.ts           ← providers config letta da .env (VITE_PROVIDER, VITE_AI_PROVIDER...)
    menu.ts          ← MenuConfig con path, title, icon, page, layout
  data/
    mockData.ts      ← dati fake per MockDataProvider
  layouts/
    Default.tsx      ← layout wrapper (header + sidebar + main + footer)
  sections/
    Header.tsx / Sidebar.tsx / PageHeader.tsx / Footer.tsx / PreLoader.tsx
  pages/
    home/HomePage.tsx
    [altre pagine dal template scelto]
  styles/
    globals.css      ← @import '@llmnative/react/dist/index.css' + Tailwind override
.env                 ← VITE_PROVIDER, VITE_THEME, chiavi API (non committare)
.env.example         ← stessa struttura, valori vuoti (committare)
vite.config.ts / tsconfig.json / postcss.config.js / index.html
```

**Pattern conf/app.ts** (auto-generato, leggere per capire come funziona):
```ts
import type { AppProvidersConfig } from '@llmnative/react'
import { mockData } from '../data/mockData'
const env = import.meta.env

export const providers: AppProvidersConfig = {
  mock: { data: mockData },
  ai: { openaiApiKey: env.VITE_OPENAI_API_KEY ?? '' },  // AI dentro providers, non prop <App>
  services: { data: 'mock', auth: 'googleAuth' },
}
```

---

## Gotchas — pitfall frequenti

| Errore | Causa | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| `aiConfig` prop non esiste su `<App>` | La config AI va dentro `providers.ai`, NON come prop separata | `providers={{ ai: { openaiApiKey } }}` |
| `inputType` non è una prop di `Input` | `InputProps` omette il type interno | Usa `<Input.Number>`, `<Input.Email>`, `<Input.Date>` ecc. |
| `Menu context=` non esiste | La prop si chiama `menuKey` | `<Menu menuKey="main" />` |
| `SignInButton` non esiste | Rinominato | `<AuthButton />` |
| `firebase: { config: ... }` errato | FirebaseConfig è flat | `firebase: { apiKey, authDomain, databaseURL, ... }` |
| `google: { oAuth2: { clientId } }` errato | GoogleProviderConfig è flat | `google: { clientId, scope }` |
| Route "/" non funziona (Missing Page: ./pages/Home.js) | Il framework inietta sempre `default: [{ path: "/" }]` senza `page` — chiama `importPage` e fallisce | Aggiungi `default: [{ path: '/', page: HomePage, layout: Default }]` nel tuo `menuConfig`: lo spread sovrascrive il fallback interno |
| `children` su `Grid` | Grid non accetta children | Usa `form={<Fields />}` per il form inline |
| `recordId` su `Form` | Prop non esiste | La chiave del record viene da URL automaticamente |
| `MenuConfig` non importabile | Era type interno | Ora esportato: `import type { MenuConfig } from '@llmnative/react'` |
| `GridCellContext` non importabile | Mancava dall'index | Ora esportato: `import type { GridCellContext } from '@llmnative/react'` |

---

## Dove cercare nel codice sorgente

| Cosa | File |
|---|---|
| Form | `src/components/widgets/Form.tsx` |
| Grid | `src/components/widgets/Grid.tsx` |
| Prompt | `src/components/widgets/Prompt.tsx` |
| Campi form | `src/components/ui/fields/` |
| Blocks (Menu, Toolbar, Notifications, Dropdown…) | `src/components/blocks/` |
| Provider data Firebase (RTDB) | `src/providers/data/firebase.ts` |
| Provider data Firestore | `src/providers/data/firestore.ts` |
| Provider data Supabase | `src/providers/data/supabase.ts` |
| Provider storage Firebase | `src/providers/storage/firebase.ts` |
| Provider storage Supabase | `src/providers/storage/supabase.ts` |
| Provider auth Firebase | `src/providers/auth/firebase/FirebaseAuthProvider.ts` |
| Provider auth Supabase | `src/providers/auth/supabase/` |
| Provider auth Google | `src/providers/auth/google/` |
| Provider auth Dropbox | `src/providers/auth/dropbox/` |
| Provider email Gmail | `src/providers/email/google/GmailEmailProvider.ts` |
| Provider AI definitions | `src/providers/ai/` |
| Provider credenziali | `src/providers/credentials/` |
| Provider session | `src/providers/ProviderSession.ts` |
| Proxy CORS | `src/providers/proxy.ts` |
| Motion system | `src/motion.ts` |
| I18n | `src/I18n.tsx` |
| Dropbox integration | `src/providers/dropbox/` |
| Interfaccia DataProvider | `src/providers/data/DataProvider.ts` |
| Interfaccia StorageProvider | `src/providers/storage/StorageProvider.ts` |
| Interfaccia AuthProvider | `src/providers/auth/AuthProvider.ts` |
| Interfaccia EmailProvider | `src/providers/email/EmailProvider.ts` |
| Interfaccia AIProvider | `src/providers/ai/AIProvider.ts` |
| Registry provider | `src/providers/manifest.ts` |
| Config provider | `src/providers/ProviderConfiguration.ts` |
| SEO / Google Trends | `src/providers/seo/google/` |
| Sistema tema | `src/Theme.tsx` |
| Config runtime | `src/Config.tsx` |
| Tipi TypeScript | `src/types/` |
| Utilities pure | `src/libs/` |
